site.title: The AI Signal Sheet
site.subtitle: A weekly note from Silicon Valley on what actually moved in AI
site.author: Kiara Zhang

posts.title: The AI Signal Sheet · Week of July 6, 2026
posts.summary: OpenAI ships GPT-5.6 in three tiers and ChatGPT Work in a single day, packaging the enterprise agent into a paid SKU. Anthropic publishes GRAM, routing dual-use knowledge into removable weight modules. Microsoft's in-house MAI displaces OpenAI and Anthropic across Excel and Outlook, with Suleyman calling for the eventual elimination of that spend. Meta prices Muse Spark 1.1 at 17–28% of frontier list — its first paid flagship. Apple sues OpenAI and io Products over hardware trade secrets.
